description.value:
Queen Ileosa's ring (Appendix 5; PF1e 180,000 gp → 18,000 gp). Invested ring of warded vanity.

  • Glamour at will (1 action, illusion): restyle the apparent fashion of your worn armor, clothing, and weapons — no mechanical change, no drastic size change.
  • Worn wards: +1 item bonus to AC and to all saving throws (already included in Queen Ileosa's stat block).
  • Splendid Security (reaction, 1/hour): when targeted by an attack, spell, or effect, gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC or save against it.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
